verses.4: TaAAruju almalaikatu waalrroohu ilayhi fee yawmin kana miqdaruhu khamseena alfa sanatin
verses.11: Yubassaroonahum yawaddu almujrimu law yaftadee min AAathabi yawmiithin bibaneehi
verses.14: Waman fee alardi jameeAAan thumma yunjeehi
verses.27: Waallatheena hum min AAathabi rabbihim mushfiqoona
verses.30: Illa AAala azwajihim aw ma malakat aymanuhum fainnahum ghayru maloomeena
verses.31: Famani ibtagha waraa thalika faolaika humu alAAadoona
verses.38: AyatmaAAu kullu imriin minhum an yudkhala jannata naAAeemin
verses.40: Fala oqsimu birabbi almashariqi waalmagharibi inna laqadiroona
verses.41: AAala an nubaddila khayran minhum wama nahnu bimasbooqeena
verses.42: Fatharhum yakhoodoo wayalAAaboo hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee yooAAadoona
verses.43: Yawma yakhrujoona mina alajdathi siraAAan kaannahum ila nusubin yoofidoona
verses.44: KhashiAAatan absaruhum tarhaquhum thillatun thalika alyawmu allathee kanoo yooAAadoona
